iterations.theme: Invocation, Healing, and Deliverance through the Holy Spirit and the Name of Jesus
iterations.reason_for_cut: This is the entire podcast, which is shorter than the minimum block size, so it forms a single, complete thematic unit.

chapters.topic: Invocation of the Holy Spirit for presence and guidance
Calls for the Holy Spirit to pour out and inhabit
Acknowledging Christ through the Spirit and asking for sanctification
Musical worship: 'He is a faithful God' and 'Jesus is holy'
The power of Jesus' name and prayer for signs and wonders
Prayer for God's Kingdom to come and release of spiritual power
Musical worship: Healing through Jesus' blood
Prayer for Jesus as Savior and Healer for all ailments
Healing of emotions, past traumas, and false beliefs
Healing the image of God the Father and addressing the 'fatherless' lie
Gratitude for God's love and invitation to present personal needs
Musical worship: Healing through Jesus' blood and holy name
Prayer for healing of incurable diseases and physical pains
Prayer for broken family relationships and absent fathers
Prayer for the unloved, rejected, and youth struggling with identity
Renewal of dreams and healing for those hurt due to unique talents
Invocation of the Holy Spirit for health and God's Kingdom
Musical worship: 'How mighty is His name'
Assurance of answered prayer in Jesus' name and final personal prayer
Thanksgiving for God's faithfulness and the power of His name
